title: MinecraftContentExpansion
description: New early game, new materials, new mechanics, new tools and much more!
body:
![Logo](https://gitlab.com/Boy132/minecraftcontentexpansion/-/raw/master/src/main/resources/logo.png)

**MCE** - short for **MinecraftContentExpansion** - is a Forge mod which aims to expand the game while keeping the "original feeling". All main [features](https://gitlab.com/Boy132/minecraftcontentexpansion/-/wikis/Features) can be toggled in the config.

- *Minecraft* => stay true to the "original feeling"  
- *Content* => add more things to do  
- *Expansion* => expand the gameplay  

## Overview

The mod adds new blocks, items, mechanics and also changes some existing game mechanics.  
This includes new ways of wood working, new tool & armor crafting, new materials, new decoration and building blocks, new crops and food, new and expanded early game, energy based machines for the late game and much more!

**It is highly recommended to use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) and/ or [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) for ingame guidance!  
You can also visit our [Wiki](https://gitlab.com/Boy132/minecraftcontentexpansion/-/wikis/Guides) for some online guides.**


## Languages


- English (100%)
- German (100%)

[Help us translate the mod!](https://poeditor.com/join/project/tY2034qKfH)


## Some notes

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack. But, this mod is intended as standalone mod so compatibility with other (gameplay) mods is not granted!
